indicators.name: long wooden conference table
indicators.rationale: The long wooden conference table is too narrow for a single user to comfortably set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: The seating arrangement is designed for group meetings rather than individual work, making it unsuitable for solo computer work.

indicators.name: whiteboard
indicators.rationale: The whiteboard is not suitable for computer work as it is designed for collaborative brainstorming sessions.

indicators.name: overhead lighting
indicators.rationale: The overhead lighting provides general illumination suitable for computer work.

indicators.name: glass partition
indicators.rationale: The glass partition provides some level of privacy, which can be beneficial for focused solo work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While the overhead lighting is suitable for computer work, the long wooden conference table and seating arrangement are not designed for individual work, making it difficult to set up a comfortable workstation. The glass partition provides some privacy, which can be beneficial for focused solo work.
